title: Atsonupuri
summary:
Atsonupuri (Russian: РҗСӮСҒРҫРҪСғРҝСғСҖРё; Ainu: гӮўгғҲгӮҘгӮөгғҢгғ—гғӘ, Atusa-nupuri; Japanese: йҳҝзҷ»дҪҗеІі, Atosa-dake) is a stratovolcano located in the central part of Iturup Island, Kuril Islands, Russia.


== References ==
text: Atsonupuri (Russian: РҗСӮСҒРҫРҪСғРҝСғСҖРё; Ainu: гӮўгғҲгӮҘгӮөгғҢгғ—гғӘ, Atusa-nupuri; Japanese: йҳҝзҷ»дҪҗеІі, Atosa-dake) is a stratovolcano located in the central part of Iturup Island, Kuril Islands, Russia.
